question: The bar chart shows site visits from 2018 to 2022. Which statement best describes the visits in 2021 and 2022 as depicted by the chart?

options.B: Visits in 2021 and 2022 appear to be the same height, suggesting similar visit counts.
options.C: 2019 clearly has the highest number of visits.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top bars are truncated and looks identical.
